name: cardiometabolic_tracker
description: Adult GLP-1 weight-management tracker: weight vs. own baseline with %TBWL milestones, an expected-response band selected from the patient's GLP-1 agent (STEP-1/SURMOUNT-1/SCALE), and 4-week velocity with plateau/regain/rapid-loss decision support.

protocols.description: Renders an adult cardiometabolic weight trajectory chart from the patient's weight observations.
